creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 176415
patch

Builds fine on Poudriere with 11.0 with both c7 and c7_64.

Changelog:
https://rhn.redhat.com/errata/RHSA-2016-2047.html

It's a security update, but since it touches the Linux kernel, I don't think the vulnerability can be used on FreeBSD.
